fetched_from_publisher: U.S. Department of the Treasury, TIC system (home.treasury.gov / treasury.gov Documents); fetch dates 2026-07-01 UTC; every raw file retained in build/reserve/rdt_evidence/tic/; append-only log build/reserve/rdt_evidence/tic/_RDT_fetch_log.txt

positions.units: USD billions, end of month, total Treasury securities (long-term SLT + short-term bills concept of the MFH table); Table-3/slt3d rows are millions converted /1000
positions.latest_published_month: 2026-04 (TIC release of 2026-06; slt_table3.txt and slt_table5.txt both end 2026-04)
positions.source_precedence: mfhhis01.csv (MFH history, latest revision) > slt_table3.txt (2020-01..2026-04) > slt3d_globl.csv (frozen 2011-09..2023-01 vintage)

India.pre2013_gap: 2005-01..2005-12 absent from mfhhis01 (India not a named MFH line that year)

Poland.pre2013_gap: 2008-01..2008-12 absent from mfhhis01 (Poland not a named MFH line that year)
Poland.why_ends_2025_12: Poland total holdings are n.a. in slt_table3.txt/slt3d_globl.csv from 2015-01 onward (short-term component not published) and Poland is not in the top-20 slt_table5.txt; the MFH history (mfhhis01.csv) carries Poland totals only through 2025-12. Long-term-only Poland holdings for 2026-01..2026-04 exist in the retained slt_table3.txt (for_lt_treas_pos) but were NOT mixed into the total series.

integrity_anchor_russia_2018.verdict: REPLICATED (96.1 in 2018-03 to 14.9 by 2018-05, from mfhhis01.csv; corroborated by slt3d_globl.csv: 96.05 / 48.724 / 14.905)

form_s_transactions_same_months_busd.note: Form S net long-term Treasury sales; the remainder of the holdings drop is short-term bills and non-transaction effects, per the data

transactions.units: USD billions, monthly net foreign purchases of long-term U.S. Treasury bonds & notes (positive = foreign position increase); short-term bills NOT included
transactions.coverage: all 8 countries, 2013-01..2026-04, 160 months each, no gaps
transactions.basis_break_2023_02: Publisher-documented series break: before 2023-02 transactions are from discontinued TIC Form S (built here as gross purchases minus gross sales of Treasury bonds & notes from s1_globl.txt; Saudi Arabia 2013-01..2014-12 from oilexp_sdata_hist_2003-2014.csv); from 2023-02 they are the expanded Form SLT net figures in slt_table3.txt. The source_file column marks the break row-by-row.
transactions.valuation_change: slt_table3.txt additionally publishes a monthly by-country Valuation Change column for long-term Treasuries FROM 2023-02 ONLY (publisher states no valuation-change data exist before the break). Raw file retained; not written into the csv (schema fixed), available for the k3 valuation split.
transactions.spot_check: China, Mainland 2016 annual net purchases sum = -155.2 busd (net selling), read from built csv

country_line_breaks_found_in_data: Russia: named MFH line exists 2007-01..2018-12 only; after 2018 Russia is below the named-holder cutoff and continues only in the all-countries files (slt3d_globl.csv to 2023-01, slt_table3.txt from 2020-01; 2026-04 value 0.026 busd).
Turkey: named MFH line ends 2017-12; continues via slt3d_globl.csv / slt_table3.txt (2026-04 value 2.610 busd).

Saudi Arabia: named line in mfhhis01.csv starts 2012-01. Publisher notice dated 5-16-2016 on the Securities (B) page: before that release the MFH table grouped Saudi Arabia inside the 'Oil Exporters' aggregate; the aggregates were discontinued and one-time historical tables were published (holdings 1974-12..2016-03 in oilexp_hist_to2016mar.csv, retained; Form S transactions 2008-01..2014-12 in oilexp_sdata_hist_2003-2014.csv, retained and used for Saudi 2013-2014 transactions).
MFH current table (slt_table5.txt) carries only the top-20 named holders + All Other since the 2023 redesign; Russia, Turkey, Poland are not named there.

MFH methodology note (8-15-2013, Securities (B) page): from that release the MFH table uses Form SLT holdings for all months (previously Form S transactions were added to prior-month SLT for the latest month).
mfh.txt at the old URL is a frozen pre-redesign snapshot (last data 2023-01, dated March 15, 2023); the live MFH table is slt_table5.txt/html.

source_disagreements_gt_1busd.note: frozen slt3d vintage vs revised MFH history; all other overlapping cells agree within rounding (mean abs diff 0.03 busd over 871 mfhhis-slt3d overlap cells; max 0.05 over 360 mfhhis-Table3 cells)

not_available: Poland total UST holdings for 2026-01..2026-04: not published (Table 3 total and short-term columns n.a. for Poland from 2015-01; Poland below top-20 of Table 5; MFH history ends 2025-12). Long-term-only figures exist in retained slt_table3.txt.

By-country valuation-change data before 2023-02: publisher states none exist (no valuation change data before the series break). Pre-2023 active-vs-valuation split must be bounded from transactions vs holdings changes, as the pre-registration anticipated.

Saudi Arabia named-line Form S transactions before 2015-01 in s1_globl.txt: not present there; covered 2008-01..2014-12 by the one-time oilexp_sdata_hist_2003-2014.csv instead (so no net gap 2013 onward).
custody_caveat: Publisher's own note on Table 5: data are collected from U.S.-based custodians/broker-dealers; securities held in overseas custody accounts may not be attributed to the actual owner (basis of the pre-registered China = mainland-alone lower bound / +Belgium+Luxembourg upper band).
